3283350.name: Operius DX Soundtrack
3283350.description:
Distant Illusions brings you the latest in immersive sound technology! Music that makes your adrenaline surge and your pupils dilate as you barrel through the hair-raisingly fast arcade action of Operius DX. We've used cutting-edge audio tools such as "synthesizer", "bass drum", and "boop" to create this melding of digital soundscapes and minor brainwashing for you to get immersed in like a hot tub full of warm porridge.

Except now, this technology is available for you outside the game! That's right, you can now load these magical little files onto your phone, mixtape, or assorted tragically retro MP3 gizmo, and feel like you're rushing through aliens and barriers anywhere you want. On the bus! In a boring Friday afternoon office meeting! In the drainage ditch after passing out on your way home from the bar after the boring office meeting!

The choice is yours. 6 tracks, available in FLAC and MP3 320kbps formats.
